_comment: Cross-genre canary: Terraria's open 2D sandbox (procedural terrain + day/night + persistence) fused with Ninja Gaiden / Shinobi sidescrolling action (wall-grab, combo attacks, stealth kills). Architectural invariants tested: (1) procedural-terrain persistence across scene boundaries via ProceduralRoomChain; (2) stealth-vs-combat co-resolution on the same enemy via VisionCone + ComboAttacks composing; (3) day/night phase modifier flipping encounter economy without scene swap.
